## Summary
- What changed and why.

## Linked Issue
- Closes #<issue-number>

## Spec Baseline
- Pinned ref: `spec-v1.0.1-m0m1`
- Verify command run:
  - [ ] `python tools/spec_sync.py verify --dest specs/vendor --version-file SPEC_VERSION.json`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] This change matches the repo charter boundary
- [ ] All issue acceptance criteria addressed
- [ ] Evidence attached (logs/tests/screenshots/links)

## Contract Change Declaration
- [ ] No runtime API/topic/proto/schema changes beyond pinned spec
- [ ] If changed, linked spec PR and new spec tag are included
